clusters.label: test-bug
clusters.fix: Tests used `new Date()` for startTime, making them wall-clock-dependent — passed during 07:00-19:00 UTC business hours, failed outside. Production correctly enforces business hours via assertWithinBusinessHours(). Pinned test `now` to '2026-04-14T10:00:00Z' (mid-business-hours); oneHourLater and the +86400000 reschedule time still land in business hours.
